examples: The dongle ACTS as both an earpiece and a controller for the phone.
Users can also use the speakerphone function or a wired earpiece to gain some distance.
The case has a mini-LCD that shows battery and earpiece battery levels along with current Bluetooth status.
The earpiece has an on-off switch, a three-stage volume control and uses a rechargeable battery.
The Pebble connects to the phones via Bluetooth, like a wireless earpiece or speaker.
